description: Phase 4 promotion gates. Ranking rules are split by baseline axis — do not mix metrics from different axes in a single promotion decision.

phase2_full_dataset.label: Frozen Phase 2 (full dataset)
phase2_full_dataset.what_it_measures: TF-IDF cosine ranking on all CVs in dataset_v1 (no train/test split).
phase2_full_dataset.use_when: Reporting end-to-end baseline parity with Phase 2 eval artifacts.
phase2_full_dataset.note: Numbers here are NOT comparable to Phase 3 same-split rows (different CVs in the metric).

phase3_same_split.label: Phase 3 (stratified CV train/test split)
phase3_same_split.what_it_measures: TF-IDF vs learners on the same held-out test CVs (apples-to-apples for model comparison).
phase3_same_split.use_when: Promoting or comparing trained candidates (LR, SVM, boosting) against TF-IDF on the same split.
phase3_same_split.note: Use the tfidf_cosine_baseline row only — not Phase 2 JSON — for this axis.

fairness_gates.description: On the evaluation set, Top-1 (or agreed metric) spread across CV match buckets (high / medium / low): max(bucket) - min(bucket).

fail.meaning: Block promotion to staging or production until each bucket meets min_eval_samples_per_bucket or eval is rerun with more data.
fail.use_when: Default; thesis / governance evidence requires complete bucket coverage.

warn_only.meaning: Promotion may proceed if spread is computed on available buckets only; document which bucket(s) are under-sampled in the model card and approval reason.
warn_only.use_when: Exploratory staging; not for production without explicit sign-off.

not_applicable_exempt.meaning: Fairness spread gate skipped for this promotion (e.g. diagnostic run). Record N/A on model card with ticket and approver.
not_applicable_exempt.use_when: Temporary exemption approved in writing (ticket + actor).

quality_gates: Phase 2 dataset quality gates pass for dataset_version in use
No regression on required API contract tests
Inference latency within org budget (define per deployment)
